items.title: [正面] great game. has a lot of potential. it just needs ...
items.summary: great game. has a lot of potential. it just needs polish like the translations in game.

items.title: [正面] as a fan of both gacha games and deck builders nat...
items.summary: as a fan of both gacha games and deck builders naturally I'm already adoring this game, with the addition of its very beautiful art style and visual novel aspects, I find it very engaging, I hope they'll add more characters over time as well because there doesn't seem to be heaps but there's still a decent amount. 10/10 game and as far as gacha games go this one doesn't feel even remotely cash grabby or predatory either which compared to other gacha styled games is like a breath of fresh air and makes me feel less anxious around getting characters or progression
